lines: Welcome — seeds and tools are stocked for the season.
Rain or shine, the store opens when you need it.
If you run low on energy, grab something simple to eat.
Parsnip is a forgiving first crop — good for learning the rhythm.
Caroline says hi — we're both rooting for your farm.
pierre.quest_line: Check your journal for town requests — deliveries pay well.

lines: The woods feel different after rain. Kind of electric.
Sometimes I practice flute by the cliffs. Want to listen sometime?
Dad worries, but I've got my own compass.
If you find weird stones in the mine, tell me — I collect oddities.
Ever tried fishing at night? Different bites, different mood.
abigail.quest_line: If a journal quest points to me, I'm probably around town or the forest edge.

lines: Morning, farmer. The valley keeps us all busy.
Town projects move faster when folks pitch in.
Seasons turn quick — plan your upgrades before winter bites.
We measure a good year in small kindnesses, not just gold.
The community center could use steady hands — think about it.
lewis.quest_line: Official notices go through the journal — complete them to lift town morale.
